title: Feuilleea lindseifolia
taxonomy: Feuilleea lindseifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The genus Feuilleea is part of the Celastrales order, which includes several families of flowering plants. Celastraceae is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the staff vine family. This family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The classification of Feuilleea lindseifolia reflects its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
